items.name: The Glorious Spirit Glide
items.description: This sled is a symbol of prestige, awarded only to players who have demonstrated their worth. Its elegant curves and intricate patterns symbolize the magic and protection of the Christmas spirits. Riding this sled offers an experience akin to embarking on a mystical journey from ancient legends.
